name: Alan Marx Memorial Pinball Fundraiser
description: The 12th Annual Alan Marx Memorial IFPA Pinball Fundraiser. Beat-the-clock qualifying format with A, B, and C skill level divisions. Doors open 11:00 AM, tournament starts at noon. No RSVP or pre-registration required.

name: Carpool Pinball Monthly League Event
description: Monthly competitive league event open to all skill levels. Counts toward championship qualification.
